zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne於大約1020年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格時，他的父親Renaud Ier de Bourgogne35歲，母親Adelaide de Normandie19歲。他和Étiennette de Longwy-Metz至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1087年11月12日在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c享年68歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne于大约1020年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布格时，他的父亲Renaud Ier de Bourgogne35岁，母亲Adelaide de Normandie19岁。他和Étiennette de Longwy-Metz至少有8个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1087年11月12日在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c享年68岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne was born about 1020, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Renaud Ier de Bourgogne, was 35 and his mother, Adelaide de Normandie, was 19. He had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. He died on 12 November 1087, in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne est né environ 1020, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Renaud Ier de Bourgogne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Normandie, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1087, à Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne um 1020 in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud Ier de Bourgogne 35 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Normandie 19. Er hatte mit Étiennette de Longwy-Metz mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1087 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne è nato il circa 1020 nel Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud Ier de Bourgogne, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Normandie, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. Morì il 12 novembre 1087, nel Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogneが約1020年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Renaud Ier de Bourgogneは35歳，母Adelaide de Normandieは19歳であった。彼はÉtiennette de Longwy-Metzとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1087年11月12日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンで68歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud Ier de Bourgogne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Normandie(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1087년 11월 12일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Renaud Ier de Bourgogne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Normandie, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1087, em Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne родился около 1020 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud Ier de Bourgogne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Normandie, 19. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. Он умер 12 ноября 1087 г. в местности бесанcон, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бесанcон, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne nació aproximadamente 1020, en Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier de Bourgogne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Normandie, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Étiennette de Longwy-Metz. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1087, en Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
